title: Penpot Design Token Schema (W3C DTCG-aligned)
description: Canonical taxonomy and naming rules for design tokens in this kit. Aligned with the W3C Design Tokens Community Group format, mapped to the REAL Penpot token types accepted by penpot.library.local.tokens.set.addToken({type,name,value}). Skills MUST reference this file rather than hardcoding token type strings.

penpotTokenTypes.description: The exact `type` strings the real Penpot Plugin API accepts in addToken({type,...}). Use these spellings verbatim — note camelCase / plural forms.

namingConvention.description: W3C DTCG dot-notation. Tiers: primitive (raw scale) -> semantic (intent) -> component (optional).

references.syntax: A token value may reference another token with curly braces: "{color.blue.500}".

tiers.purpose: Raw, context-free scale values. Never used directly on shapes when a semantic token exists.
Intent-bearing aliases that reference primitives. THIS is what shapes should bind to.
tiers.tokenSet: semantic (mode-invariant: spacing/radius/type) + modes/light & modes/dark (colour semantics; same names in both sets). See shared/modes-and-policies.md.

tiers.purpose: Optional per-component aliases that reference semantic tokens. Create only when a component needs an override surface.

spacing.description: All spacing/dimension values MUST be multiples of 4px. Off-grid values are a governance failure.

typeScale.description: Type sizes follow a Minor Third (1.2) scale unless the brand dictates otherwise.

themes.description: Themes (e.g. light/dark/high-contrast) are modeled as two mutually-exclusive colour sets in a modes/ group (modes/light active by default, modes/dark inactive) holding the SAME token names. Primitives and the mode-invariant semantic set stay constant; bindings re-resolve by name when the active modes/* set switches. See shared/modes-and-policies.md.
themes.modeled_as: penpot.library.local.tokens.themes via addTheme({ group, name }) (object arg); each theme toggles the matching modes/* set.

governanceRules.noHardcodedColor: No raw hex/rgb/hsl on shape fills/strokes when a matching semantic color token exists.
governanceRules.noOffGridSpacing: No spacing/padding/gap that is not a multiple of the 4px grid token scale.
governanceRules.noOrphanTokens: Every token should resolve and (for semantic/component tiers) reference a valid lower-tier token.
governanceRules.preferSemantic: Bind shapes to semantic tokens, not primitives, so theming works.
